mitigations.mitigation_name: Enforce strict egress filtering and ICMP rate-limiting on the FortiGate firewall (deny or heavily rate-limit raw/unsolicited ICMP and other raw packet types from endpoints to the WAN; apply per-host quotas and connection-rate limits).

args.command:
config firewall policy
edit 0
set name "Deny_ICMP_Egress"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set srcaddr "all"
set dstaddr "all"
set action deny
set schedule "always"
set service "PING"
set logtraffic all
next
end
